title: juncus subnodulosus
intro: Juncus subnodulosus, also known as nodding rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is native to Australia and is commonly found in wetlands and swamps. The medicinal properties of Juncus subnodulosus include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
